headline: Is It Time To Reassess Palo Alto Networks (PANW) After Mixed Returns And Product Expansion News
summary: If you are trying to figure out whether Palo Alto Networks at around US$162.95 is priced attractively today, the starting point is understanding what the current valuation is really telling you. The stock has recently seen mixed returns, with a 2.7% decline over the last 7 days, a 9.6% gain over 30 days, and year to date and 1 year returns of 9.2% and 11.8% declines, while the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 69.3% and 205.3% respectively.
